description: Command body instructs Claude to run 3 variations of rm -rf against the codebase; description field misleadingly says 'Manage, organize and ships your codebase'; protection relies entirely on pre_tool_use.py hook being active
suggested_fix: Update description to accurately reflect demo purpose; add explicit WARNING comment in body

description: subprocess.run npm ci / npm install executes at session setup when --install-deps flag is set; malicious package.json in working directory would auto-install attacker packages
suggested_fix: Remove --install-deps from default settings.json hook invocation or require explicit user confirmation before running

description: subprocess.run pip install -r requirements.txt executes at session setup when --install-deps flag is set; no signature or hash verification
suggested_fix: Gate behind explicit user confirmation; verify checksums if automation is required

description: subprocess.run uv sync / pip install -e . executes at session setup when --install-deps flag is set; installs from pyproject.toml without review
suggested_fix: Gate behind explicit user confirmation or document that install-deps is intentionally opt-in

description: Makes outbound Anthropic API call using ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from environment on every Stop hook invocation; key exposure depends on network and process environment security
suggested_fix: Expected behavior for AI hook; document key scope and ensure ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is scoped minimally

description: Makes outbound OpenAI API call using OPENAI_API_KEY from environment on every Stop hook invocation
suggested_fix: Expected behavior for AI hook; document key scope and usage limits

description: Makes outbound OpenAI TTS streaming call using OPENAI_API_KEY; triggered on task completion announcements
suggested_fix: Expected TTS behavior; ensure OPENAI_API_KEY usage is monitored for unexpected call volume

description: Makes outbound ElevenLabs TTS API call using ELEVENLABS_API_KEY from environment; triggered on task completion
suggested_fix: Expected TTS behavior; ensure ELEVENLABS_API_KEY is monitored for usage anomalies

description: gh issue list called via subprocess using ambient GitHub CLI credentials at every session start when --load-context is set; exposes repository issue data to Claude context
suggested_fix: Document that --load-context requires gh CLI auth; add a note in README about credential scope

description: chalk ^5.3.0 and yargs ^17.7.2 use caret ranges allowing automatic minor/patch updates without review

description: CLAUDE.md is effectively empty (1 line with no content); provides no project context, conventions, build instructions, or agent architecture overview to Claude sessions
suggested_fix: Populate with project overview, build commands (uv run), hook configuration notes, and agent/command inventory

description: 13 thin crypto agents all delegate via 'Read and Execute' to prompt files in .claude/commands/agent_prompts/; the prompt files lack frontmatter and are undiscoverable as standalone commands; if prompt files are moved the agents break silently
suggested_fix: Either consolidate instructions into agent files or add frontmatter to all prompt files and document the split pattern in CLAUDE.md

description: sentient.md description field says 'Manage, organize and ships your codebase' but body content is explicitly a destructive rm -rf demo; creates routing confusion for auto-delegation
suggested_fix: Update description to accurately reflect the rm -rf demo purpose

description: cook.md calls agents by base name (crypto-coin-analyzer, crypto-market-agent) without specifying tier; three tier variants exist (haiku/sonnet/opus) with identical descriptions; selection is non-deterministic
suggested_fix: Specify agent tier explicitly: crypto-coin-analyzer-sonnet (or whichever tier is intended)

description: Root CLAUDE.md is empty; the project has complex hook infrastructure, 19 agents, and 22 commands but no session-level context is provided to orient Claude; every session starts blind
suggested_fix: Add project overview covering: uv tool chain, hook architecture, agent tier system, and key commands
